description: You are a commercial interior designer tasked with converting a vacant residential building shell into a premium boutique fitness center called 'Core & Cardio'. Partition and furnish the space into four functional zones: an enclosed Group Fitness / Yoga Studio, fully equipped Locker Rooms / Restrooms, an open-plan Main Gym Floor, and a welcoming Reception Area. Construct at least 4 partition wall segments and define the rooms with distinct floor textures for at least 3 zones. Furnish the Reception Area with at least 1 desk/counter, 1 office chair, and 2 lounge items. Furnish the Locker Rooms with at least 4 storage lockers, 2 toilets, 2 sinks, and 2 showers. Furnish the Main Gym Floor with at least 8 pieces of gym equipment. Export a 3D render of the interior to ~/Desktop/gym_render.png and save the project file.
